metadata.title: Bourbon Mall - Recent User Flows (Audit Checklist)
metadata.description: Ordered, screen-level user journey from business onboarding to contract signing and task execution, with checklist status for each step.
metadata.scope: Business setup -> Department/services -> Staff -> Package -> Frontdesk sales order + invoice + contract -> Task calendar execution

implementationStatus.implemented: Flow exists and is reachable in UI.
implementationStatus.partial: Flow exists but has notable functional gap or weak UX coverage.
implementationStatus.missing: Expected flow is not implemented/reachable in UI.

qaStatus.failed: Validated but did not behave as expected.
qaStatus.not_tested: Not executed in current audit run.

checklistState.blocked: Cannot complete because implementation is missing/partial.

flows.title: 1. Business + Legal Onboarding
flows.goal: Create company profile, collect legal license info, accept terms, land on dashboard.

steps.action: Enter business profile details
Create owner account credentials
Validate required fields before moving to agreements.
Upload legal verification documents
steps.notes: Only license number text input exists; no legal document upload workflow.

steps.action: Read terms and conditions page.
Agree with terms to complete setup and save business profile.
Disagree flow (open modal, clear entered data, reset setup).
Navigate to dashboard after successful setup completion.
Mark business as verification completed by legal workflow.
steps.notes: Profile is saved, but no explicit verification status lifecycle is modeled.

flows.title: 2. Department + Service Design
flows.goal: Build team structure and define operational services with recurrence.

steps.action: View department cards with member and service count.
Open Create Department sidesheet from list header button.
Open existing Department sidesheet by clicking department card.
Enter department details.
Set department color (direct or inherited from parent).
Select head manager from matching department staff list.
Draft department services
Save department and publish drafted services
Inline edit department name, description, parent link, and color.
Assign/replace head manager from member table.
Add additional services from detail pane using + action.

flows.title: 3. Staff Enablement
flows.goal: Add staff into departments and maintain operational roles/status.

steps.action: Browse and search staff list
Open Add Staff sidesheet.
Open existing staff detail sidesheet by row click.
Fill basic/contact info sections.
Enter employment details
Save new staff into system and return to list.
Inline edit core staff fields (name, department, status, role).

flows.title: 4. Package Definition
flows.goal: Bundle services into sellable package with pricing for frontdesk purchase.

steps.action: View package cards (name, price, duration, included service count).
Click package card to open detail/edit sidesheet.
Start package creation from "Create Package" button.
steps.notes: Button is present but does not trigger create flow in current UI.

steps.action: Review package summary and services.
Edit package services and save
Add new service item directly from package detail.
steps.notes: Add icon exists only in edit mode but has no creation handler wired.

flows.title: 5. Frontdesk Sales + Invoice + Contract
flows.goal: Sell package, collect payment, generate contract, and complete order lifecycle.

steps.action: Review sales stats, notifications, and recent sales list.
Open recent sales detail sidesheet (resident/guardian/room/order summary).
Start new order from "Create Sales Order" button.
Select package
Set stay period and confirm package
Enter resident profile
Add guardian contacts
Select room card.
Add optional services
Set primary guardian contact and create invoice.
Review generated invoice details and pricing rows.
Record payment method
Use payment confirmation modals to mark invoice paid.
Optional: save draft or open full invoice page.
View printable A4 invoice layout and billing details.
Export or print invoice
Review contract summary.
Open full contract page for print/email/sign flow.
Complete order from contract step.
Review contract terms and policies.
Share contract and update signature status
Sign contract through signer-email verification modal.
Verify guardian email gate before showing public contract.
Allow authorized contract view and print action.
Show completion summary and guardian onboarding instructions.
Return to sales dashboard or reopen contract page.

flows.title: 6. Operations Calendar Execution
flows.goal: Parse purchased package services into dated operation tasks, allow staff execution and manager reassignment.

steps.action: Generate tasks for the stay period
View daily task board by status
Filter tasks by staff, department, and date.
Start and complete tasks with optional completion notes.
Reassign tasks to other staff through assignment modal.
Use 2-week staff availability forecast for capacity planning.
Use personal calendar in "my tasks" mode.
steps.notes: Can filter by staff manually, but no role-aware personal-only screen mode exists.

globalChecklist.summary: Business and legal onboarding flow complete
Department creation with service definitions complete
Frontdesk sales to contract lifecycle complete
Task parsing and execution board complete

knownGaps.title: No legal-document upload/verification stage
knownGaps.impact: Cannot complete explicit company-paper verification workflow.

knownGaps.title: Package creation entry is not wired
knownGaps.impact: Packages can be edited but not created from UI flow.

knownGaps.title: No dedicated personal task mode
knownGaps.impact: Individual staff can filter manually, but there is no strict role-bound "my tasks" calendar route.
